category_sources: Official OpenSCA CLI repository describes dependency, vulnerability, and license scanning.
source_facts.description says OpenSCA is a supply-chain security tool for security researchers and developers.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is opensca-cli; official repository title and source_facts.description identify it as the CLI for OpenSCA.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README contains installation, usage, parameters, report formats, and FAQ; source_facts.homepage is the official project site.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/XmirrorSecurity/OpenSCA-cli, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies supply-chain security; official README describes dependency, vulnerability, and license compliance detection.
